name: Salsa De Tomate
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion well.
2. Singe the tomatoes over an open flame and peel and chop them.
3. Heat oil in a pan and sauté the onion until it is soft and transparent but not brown. Discard the garlic.
4. Add the chopped tomatoes, beef stock, crumbled bay leaf, parsley, oregano, sugar, thyme, and salt to taste.
5. Cook until slightly thickened.
6. Add the olive slices (optional).
